tagline: Determines compensability, computes benefits and files the EDI claim — a licensed claims adjuster signs the determination.
problem: Workers'-comp claims handling is high-volume AOE/COE compensability + AWW/benefit computation under 50 state acts, where a wrong denial or benefit termination denies an injured worker statutory benefits and is actionable as bad-faith claims handling.
outcome: Injuries intaken, compensability determined and benefits computed straight-through; the licensed claims adjuster signs the compensability determination before the EDI claim is filed with the state.

steps.does: Intake the First Report of Injury (FROI) and the medical records
Determine compensability (AOE/COE) and compute the AWW and TTD/PPD benefits
Screen utilization review / treatment guidelines (MTUS / ODG) and statutory deadlines
A licensed claims adjuster signs the compensability determination
File the EDI claim / issue the determination to the state (IAIABC)
Monitor the claim status, benefit-payment timeliness and reserves
